meaning: 布伦[法国北部港市](即滨海市洛涅
examples: We are due to leave Folkestone in about five minutes and a journey to Boulogne will take approximately two hours.

Hello, ladies and gentlemen, welcome aboard your sea-link ferry from Folkestone to Boulogne and wish you a pleasant trip with us.
